name: Mars in 12-15th Nakshatra from Janma — Poverty Trigger
description: Mars transiting the 12th to 15th nakshatra from Janma Nakshatra (left hand position in SBC) triggers acute poverty and financial emergency.

source_text.quote: Mars transiting the 12th to 15th nakshatras from Janma (left hand in SBC) brings sudden poverty, loss of savings, and acute financial distress within days.

all_of: Mars is transiting the 12th, 13th, 14th, or 15th nakshatra counted from Janma Nakshatra

interpretation.meaning: Mars in the left-hand nakshatras from Janma acts as a fast trigger for poverty. When dasha and transit layers are already active, Mars pinpoints the exact day/week of financial crisis.

metadata.notes: Mars moves quickly (~2 days per nakshatra), making it an ideal fast trigger for exact timing of financial crisis events.

name: Moon/Mars on 16th Nakshatra (Sanghatika) — Debt Trigger
description: Moon or Mars transiting the 16th nakshatra from Janma (Sanghatika nakshatra) triggers sudden debt accumulation and forced borrowing.

source_text.quote: The 16th nakshatra from Janma is Sanghatika (collective). Moon or Mars here brings collective financial obligations, forced debt, and obligations to creditors.

all_of: Moon or Mars is transiting the 16th nakshatra counted from Janma Nakshatra (Sanghatika position)

interpretation.meaning: Sanghatika nakshatra activation by fast movers (Moon/Mars) crystallizes latent debt tendencies into actual borrowing events. The native is forced into financial obligations.

metadata.notes: Sanghatika (16th from Janma) represents collective/social obligations. Financial interpretation: forced debt through social or institutional pressure.

name: Moon/Mars on 23rd Nakshatra (Vinasha) — Asset Destruction Trigger
description: Moon or Mars transiting the 23rd nakshatra from Janma (Vinasha/destruction nakshatra) triggers asset destruction and irreversible financial loss.

source_text.quote: The 23rd nakshatra from Janma is Vinasha (destruction). Moon or Mars here causes destruction of assets, irreversible losses, and financial ruin.

all_of: Moon or Mars is transiting the 23rd nakshatra counted from Janma Nakshatra (Vinasha position)

interpretation.meaning: Vinasha nakshatra is the destruction point. Fast transits (Moon/Mars) here during active crisis windows trigger the actual moment of asset loss — foreclosure, seizure, or irreversible financial destruction.

metadata.notes: Vinasha (23rd from Janma) is the most destructive nakshatra position. When dasha+transit are active, this is the final pinpoint trigger.
